subcodes.first_line: O Rabi'! Be thou God's springtide in these days, that through thee the Lote-Trees of existence might be clothed in verdure and yield forth fruits [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ربیع کن ربیع الله فی تلک الایام لتخضر منک سدرات الوجود و تثمرن بفواکه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
